title: CommandCreatedEventHandler Object
description: Class that contains the call back function that is called when the CommandCreated event is fired.

methods.name: notify
methods.description: This notify member is called when an event is triggered from any event that this handler has been added to.

related_samples.name: Command Inputs API Sample
related_samples.description:
Creates a command dialog that demonstrates all of the available command inputs.

To use the sample, create a new Python or C++ script and copy and paste this code, replacing the default code.  You also need to unpack this zip file which contains a resource folder into the same folder where the source code file (.py or .cpp) is.

notify.title: CommandCreatedEventHandler.notify Method
notify.description: This notify member is called when an event is triggered from any event that this handler has been added to.

parameters.name: eventArgs
parameters.description: The arguments object with details about this event and the firing CommandEvent.
